_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: histomorphometry was performed in frontal bone...The bone formation rate (BFR) in CKO mice was increased on both the extracranial and intracranial surfaces
